title: calendula stipitata
intro: Calendula stipitata, also known as orange marigold or yellow marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Calendula stipitata include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues. Calendula stipitata can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or cream, and is often used in herbal preparations to support skin health and promote healing.
